title: munronia breviflora
intro: Munronia breviflora, also known as the Munronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Munronia breviflora is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in the form of a tincture or a decoction.
